extracted.serif_typography: Radley / Georgia body, Futura PT headings

borrowed: hero composition with large food photography
recipe card design with meta info
typography hierarchy using serif display fonts
avoided: Bon Appétit yellow/gold palette (conflicts with terracotta brief)

step_3_hero_component.reason: MCP returned [object Object] — no usable code generated
step_3_hero_component.fallback: Hero built manually using design system from Step 1
hero_features: Split layout: text left, full-bleed image right
Playfair Display headline with word-by-word fade+rise animation (900ms, 130ms stagger)
Social proof bar with avatar stack and cook count
Floating 'New Recipe Every Week' badge with floatBob animation

step_4_screen_generation.reason: All sections built directly from brief — comprehensive design tokens and content made Stitch redundant
step_4_screen_generation.note: Stitch MCP was connected and available

step_5_image_generation.reason: Brief Step 6 explicitly states: 'Use these existing images — do NOT generate new ones'

images_used.section: Brown Butter Sage Pasta recipe card
Dark Chocolate Layer Cake recipe card
Mango Avocado Summer Salad recipe card

tech_stack.fonts: Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Lora, DM Sans)
tech_stack.javascript: Vanilla JS — no build tools, no frameworks

sections: Fixed/sticky navbar with scroll blur + shadow + mobile menu + active link highlight
Hero — split layout, animated headline, CTAs, social proof, floating badge
Recipes — 3-column card grid (pasta, cake, salad) with image zoom on hover
Featured — wide horizontal card (lamb shoulder) with cook time, servings, difficulty
Stats Strip — 4 animated counters (240+ recipes, 18 categories, 50k+ cooks, infinity good meals)
About — dark background, image + personal story + Read My Story CTA
Footer — logo, nav links, Instagram + Pinterest social icons
animations: Hero title: fadeRise 900ms, word stagger 130ms each
Card stagger: s1=0ms, s2=100ms, s3=200ms, s4=300ms transition-delay
Recipe card hover: translateY(-8px) + box-shadow + image scale(1.07)
Featured card hover: box-shadow + image scale(1.04)
CTA button hover: translateY(-2px) + terracotta shadow
Outline button hover: translateY(-2px) + terracotta color
Nav links: underline slide-in on active/hover
Stats count-up: cubic ease-out over ~1800ms on scroll into view

seo.title: Kitchen Stories — Food made with love, shared freely.
seo.meta_description: A curated collection of recipes from my kitchen to yours. From quick weeknight dinners to slow Sunday bakes.
seo.og_title: Kitchen Stories — Food made with love, shared freely.
seo.og_description: A curated collection of recipes from my kitchen to yours. From quick weeknight dinners to slow Sunday bakes.
